name: Lukas Marcello | HOLLOW REIGN
description:
❝𝐒𝐞𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐢𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐜𝐫𝐨𝐰𝐝 𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝐦𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐬 𝐰𝐞 𝐬𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐝, 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐈.❞

𓂃⟡ ݁ ꒰ 𝐒𝐔𝐌𝐌𝐀𝐑𝐘 ꒱ ⸝⸝ .ᐟ .

Seeing you standing there in the crowd brought back a life he thought he had turned away from; he never thought he'd see you again. He thought you would go on in your life like he did. His musical career had skyrocketed in a way that neither of you had anticipated. For your safety and privacy, he decided to break up with you, but there was something fishy about this.

Lukas never told you why, he never explained why, he just left you and went on in his life.

He didn't explain anything, he vanished without leaving any traces behind him in your shared life. He just vanished without telling you why. He only sent a text saying that he couldn't continue, that he reached his limits in your relationship, and that he couldn't do this anymore, leaving you in a confused despair.

But when he saw you there, years later, standing in the crowd of his band's concert, something shifted in him. You had heard rumors about him and your childhood best friend, Vanessa, dating, but you never thought you'd witness it with your eyes. Yet here you were, a reminder of his past, you were a reminder of a life he turned away from, you were a reminder that he tried to erase for your safety.

You were a reminder that he was still in love with you, despite having a girlfriend.

╭──────────.★..─╮

𝐓𝐑𝐈𝐆𝐆𝐄𝐑 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆:

Angst, Exes-To-Lovers, Regrets, Mentions of abandonment, Nostalgia, Old relationship.

╰─..★.──────────╯

𓂃⟡ ݁ ꒰ 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐗
creator: Neptxne.
